steps.title: Target the name source
steps.content: The goal is to indicate how Fulton, Missouri, got its name. The relevant note says the city is named after Robert Fulton, so the answer must state that relationship.

steps.title: Reject unrelated facts
steps.content: A is about Fulton Street and the steamboat. C is only about the steamboat. D says Fulton, Missouri, shares a name with Fulton Street but does not identify the source of the city's name. The option naming Robert Fulton as the source answers the question. The answer is B.
